Overview

About the simulation.

Ticket to Life is a trainer-led, team-based simulation that walks players through seven chapters of one shared life — from education and a first job to money, relationships, home and legacy. Every chapter is a real decision, and players feel the long-term payoff of their choices — building the financial literacy and life-design mindset to plan their own future with confidence.

Seven chapters, one shared life — every chapter is a real decision.
Who benefits

Built for the people who carry the decisions.

Students & fresh graduates

Young people preparing for the financial and career decisions of adult life.

Early-career professionals

Those navigating first jobs, budgets and long-term goals.

Schools, universities & CSR programs

Organizations building real-world life-readiness.

Impact

Competencies developed.

01

Financial Literacy

Budgeting, saving and understanding the true cost of everyday choices.

02

Decision-Making

Weigh trade-offs and see how today's choices shape tomorrow.

03

Goal-Setting

Define a personal vision and plan the path to reach it.

04

Life & Career Planning

Connect education, work, money and relationships into one journey.

Learning outcomes

By the end, participants will…

  • ✓Understand how everyday financial choices compound over a lifetime.
  • ✓Connect education, career, money and relationships into a single life plan.
  • ✓Practice setting goals and making trade-offs under real constraints.
  • ✓Reflect on personal values and what a meaningful life means to them.
  • ✓Build the confidence to plan and own their future decisions.
